positive: An intricate, whimsical celestial forest scene with glowing bioluminescent flora, stylized cosmic creatures, and deep space nebulas interwoven with organic root structures. The central focus is a stylized, geometric representation of a crescent moon orbiting oversized, abstract star clusters. Composition is symmetrical and vibrant, designed as a repeating pattern on fabric. Use a color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, cosmic lavender, and glowing gold accents. The art style should be neo-psychedelic linework meets Art Deco geometry, with strong silhouette definition and crisp vector lines against a deep void background. Perfect for apparel transfer print.
